product.detailWeb:
From the brand

 
 
  1.  

  2. xuenair was founded in 2013 and has been dedicated to furniture protection for over 10 years. We have a very rich experience and customer base in this industry!

    Why do Many customers choose us?

    Our products are tested many times before production, and we pay attention to the materials and details during the production process; and we listen carefully to our customers' voices and upgrade our products in response to their suggestions!

     
  3.  
     
     
     

    Summer New Products --Fan

     
  4.  
     
     
     

    xuenair clear furniture bumper

     
  5.  
     
     
     

    xuenair Bed Risers

     
  6.  
     
     
     

    xuenair Headboard Stoppers

     
  7.  
     
     
     

    xuenair Laptop Desk

     
  8.  
     
     
     

    xuenair Cutting Board Holder

     
 
 

Product description

Quality PVC Material

The cabinet door bumper is made of upgraded silicone rubber instead of the traditional soft rubber, which will last longer. Can be used on the car door, sun and rain will not make it turn yellow.

720° Rotate，Tough And Soft

The cupboard bumper is very tough and soft, long use will not be deformed, very suitable for use on the shower sliding door or refrigerator door.

Unique Airbag Cushion Design

The unique airbag design of the bumper makes the anti-collision performance greatly enhanced to better protect your cabinet corners or refrigerator doors.

 
 
L Shaped Clear Corner Protectors Baby Proof for Furniture
T Shaped Clear Corner Protectors Baby Proof for Furniture
